The '''Trade City''' was one of the largest [[City/Legends|cities]] on the planet [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] in the [[Perave system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{City-stub}}
